session_label: ISAM Yordam direct exercise for Cihansah Hakiki witness probing (chunk 2 of 4 splitting lost Subagent C Ottoman scope)
scope: Exercise the ISAM Yordam search interface (katalog.isam.org.tr/yordam/) directly via WebFetch with a Turkish + Arabic-script + homonym query battery. Replaces the lost Subagent C zero-hit site-restricted Google sweep for ISAM with a direct catalogue probe.
context_note: Prior main-context site-restricted Google sweep (probe_2026-05-11_avenue_provincial_ottoman_sufi_maincontext.json, ISAM section) returned 0 indexed hits for Cihansah / Hakiki / Karakoyunlu. This direct Yordam exercise uses URL-parameter GET form (q=<term>, dil=0, p=<page>) and shows Yordam IS server-rendered with embedded result data, so WebFetch extraction works without Playwright.

method_summary.rendering: Server-rendered HTML with embedded result cards. NOT a JS-rendered SPA shell. WebFetch extraction reliable.
method_summary.encoding_note: Turkish-character queries require URL-encoded UTF-8 (e.g., Cihansah = Cihan%C5%9Fah). Persian Arabic-script queries can be sent URL-encoded but return 0 results because Yordam does not index Persian-script.

query_battery_executed.new_witness_or_edition_finding: Degirmencay 2021 Erzurum reprint/revision of Persian-poems edition is NEW relative to v1.0 search_keys.json editions list (which had Degirmencay 2004 only). This is an EDITION-CHAIN finding, not a manuscript witness.

query_battery_executed.outcome: Bulk noise: name-token overlap with translators (Vildan Sahin / Nihal Cihan), editors (Cihan Okuyucu), and unrelated geographic content. NO direct Cihansah Qaraqoyunlu witness records beyond what the Cihansah query already surfaces.

Predominantly secondary scholarship: Uzuncarsili Anadolu Beylikleri (1937, 1969), Budak Munsi Kazvini Cevahirul-ahbar (2000/1378). NO manuscript records of the Divan-i Hakiki itself. Likely candidates for v1.0 citation register; not new witnesses.

Mixed set: includes Degirmencay 2004 Cihansah Farsca siirleri; rest are Haki Hakiki (modern translator), Hakikiyye dersleri (Ali Kemal 1907 Turkish lit study), and Yusuf Hakiki subset. NO new manuscript witnesses.
Identical result count to circumflex query (Yordam appears to use accent-insensitive matching for the Hakiki/Hakiki pair). Top records overlap with circumflex query.

query_battery_executed.disambiguation_outcome: All 8 records use the call-number-prefix T811.215 (Yusuf Hakiki Baba slot) vs Cihansah's T811.225 (Cihansah slot). Yordam call-number assignment treats the two Hakikis as DISTINCT authors with separate Dewey-like buckets. ZERO Cihansah/Karakoyunlu cross-reference within Yusuf Hakiki records. ZERO manuscript witness records (all printed scholarship).

query_battery_executed.outcome: 31 records mixing Cihansah Qaraqoyunlu and Yusuf Hakiki Divan editions plus Kerim Hakiki spiritual-progression work (1957/1959 cluster). NO manuscript witnesses.

query_battery_executed.outcome: Same Degirmencay edition pair + Turk Tarih Kongresi. NO manuscript witnesses.
Bulunan: 0 Adet. Compound name-token query returns 0; Yordam ranks single-token matches separately.

yusuf_hakiki_homonym_disambiguation.ISAM_call_number_separation: ISAM Yordam assigns distinct Dewey-like call-number prefixes to the two Hakikis: T811.225 = Cihansah Qaraqoyunlu, T811.215 = Yusuf Hakiki Baba (Bursa). This is a CATALOGUER-level disambiguation already in place at ISAM.
yusuf_hakiki_homonym_disambiguation.bursavi_link: Confirmed via Cavusoglu Erciyes University 2002 doctoral dissertation on Yusuf Hakiki's Mahabbet-name (T811.215 CAV.Y 2002). Yusuf Hakiki Baba is the standard Turkish-Ottoman 15th-century mystic poet of Bursa/Aksaray area, distinct from Cihansah Qaraqoyunlu.
yusuf_hakiki_homonym_disambiguation.no_cross_contamination: All 8 Yusuf Hakiki records contain ZERO mentions of Cihansah / Karakoyunlu / Qaraqoyunlu cross-reference. ISAM cataloguers have correctly separated the two authors.

cihansah_qaraqoyunlu_isam_holdings_synth.manuscript_witnesses_inferred_negative_b: ISAM Kutuphanesi is a research library for Islamic-studies scholarship, NOT a primary manuscript repository. Yordam holds books, theses, and serials (357,627 items total per 2026-05-11 statistics); manuscripts are catalogued separately at yazmalar.gov.tr / yazma.org.tr / Diyanet (yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr) / Sleymaniye / Beyazit. The 0-manuscript outcome at ISAM is structurally expected.
edition_chain_findings: Degirmencay 2021 Erzurum (Persian poems): NEW entry for v2.0 editions_and_studies list
Degirmencay 2004 Erzurum (Persian poems): CONFIRMED present in ISAM holdings
Macit 2002 Ankara Grafiker (Turkish poems): CONFIRMED present in ISAM holdings (T811.225 CIH.K 2002 cluster confirms Macit 2002 specifically referenced)
Demirci 1997 DTCF article: NOT specifically surfaced in WebFetch top-3 output but may exist in 89-record Karakoyunlu hit set
secondary_scholarship_observations: Uzuncarsili Anadolu Beylikleri 1937 + 1969 editions both present (89-record Karakoyunlu set top hits): standard Turkish historical-survey context
Budak Munsi Kazvini Cevahir-i ahbar 2000/1378: Persian-language Qaraqoyunlu chronicle, scholarly secondary source

yordam_methodology_findings: Yordam IS server-rendered with embedded result-card HTML, NOT a JS-rendered SPA shell. WebFetch extraction reliable across all 13 queries tested.
URL pattern katalog.isam.org.tr/yordam/?p=<page>&dil=0&q=<urlencoded_term> works directly via GET; no POST form required.
Persian Arabic-script queries return 0 results (Yordam indexes Romanized/Turkish-orthography forms only).
Yordam accent-insensitive matching: q=Hakiki and q=Hakiki (with circumflex) both return 104 results identically.

Compound queries like 'Cihansah Hakiki' or 'Cihan Sah Karakoyunlu' return 0 hits; single-token queries are the productive form. Yordam's tokenizer appears to require exact word-boundary matching without phrase-AND semantics on multi-word queries.
Pagination beyond p=1 redirects to login interface (observed on p=2 fetch). Single-page sweep at p=1 captures top-20-30 ranked records; deeper hits require authenticated session.

summary.v2_finding_label: Degirmencay 2021 Erzurum (Persian poems) edition - ADD to editions_and_studies_for_backchain list as F-EDITION1
summary.verdict: ISAM Yordam PROBED NEGATIVE for manuscript witnesses (structurally expected: ISAM is a printed-scholarship library, not a manuscript repository). One EDITION-CHAIN update for v2.0 (Degirmencay 2021).
summary.site_restricted_google_false_negative_de: Prior site-restricted Google query (probe_2026-05-11_avenue_provincial_ottoman_sufi_maincontext.json) returned 0 hits for site:katalog.isam.org.tr 'Cihansah'. This direct Yordam exercise returned 5 hits for q=Cihansah. Demonstrates that site-restricted Google indexing has a real false-negative class for Yordam (likely robots.txt or shallow crawl depth on katalog.isam.org.tr). Direct Yordam GET-form exercise IS the productive method.
residual_gaps: Pagination beyond p=1 requires authenticated session (login interface returned on p=2). Estimated impact: low; the productive hits already surface in p=1.
Yordam authority-index endpoints (Eser Adi, Yazar, Konu Basligi browsing) not exercised in this chunk; could surface Cihansah authority-record metadata.
